title: Structure & Arch Supervisor (A1 builder)
description:
1. Site  Management

·       Assist the Senior Site Supervisor in planning, organizing, and directing daily site operations.

·       Monitor work progress and ensure adherence to project schedules and timelines.

·       Conduct regular site inspections to ensure compliance with safety regulations and quality standards.

2. Team Coordination

  • Collaborate with various teams, including subcontractors, laborers, and suppliers, to facilitate smooth workflow and communication.
  • Provide guidance and support to site personnel, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.

3. Safety Compliance

  • Promote a culture of safety on-site by implementing and enforcing safety protocols and practices.
  • Conduct safety meetings and training sessions, ensuring all team members are aware of safety procedures.
  • Responsible for the safe work environment for the work area under your control.

4. Quality Control

  • Oversee the quality of work performed on-site, ensuring that it meets project specifications and industry standards.
  • Address and resolve any quality issues promptly and effectively.

5. Documentation and Reporting

  • Maintain accurate records of daily activities, including work progress, safety inspections, and incidents.
  • Assist in preparing reports for project stakeholders, providing updates on site conditions and progress.

6. Problem Solving

  • Identify and address potential issues that may impact project timelines or quality, proactively seeking solutions.
  • Liaise with the Senior Site Supervisor / Construction Manager to escalate significant concerns and implement corrective actions as needed.

7. Other Duties

  • To ensure compliance of Company’s Integrated Management System (IMS).
  • To ensure full compliance with WSHA and its Regulations.
  • Any other duties as instructed by the Management.


HOW TO APPLY :

Interested candidates, please submit your resume by clicking on “Apply Now” or aliceyap@hkmsvs.com

All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be notified

Yap Lay Choo

EA Licence No. 03C5391 | Registration No. R1987101

postedCompany.description:
HKM HR Management, founded in 1996, is a leading recruiter and executive search company in Singapore.

We provide a full range of human capital solutions to SMEs and MNCs across all industries as well as offer exciting job opportunities to job seekers.

Our team of dedicated recruitment professionals serves a varied clientele from industiies such as Semi-conductors, Oil & Gas, Maritime, Supply Chain Management, Automotive, Aerospace, Pharmaceutical, Financial Institutions, Services, Government / Defence and IT.
